Gucci Jackie series small shoulder bag
Crafted from top-quality leather, this brand-new Gucci Jackie series shoulder bag showcases the brand's classic craftsmanship, crescent shape, and fashionable design. The light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and the included strap with red and green stripes combine to offer more styling possibilities for this Gucci Jackie series small shoulder bag in ivory white leather.
Model: 782849
Color: Ivory white patent leather
Dimensions: 27.5x19x4cm
